title: ARCHIVED - Acknowledgements - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Acknowledgements

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
The authors wish to acknowledge the contributions of the following individuals for the useful advice and suggestions that they continuously provided during the course of this project: Mary Collins, Nancy Dubois, Gauden Galea, Andrew Hazlewood, Wayne Mitic and Claude Rocan. We are also deeply grateful to our respondents who took time from their full and busy lives to contribute to this work. This project was undertaken by the World Health Organization Collaborating Centre on Chronic Non Communicable Disease Policy, with funding provided by the Public Health Agency of Canada.
